title: HuBMAP Donor and Tissue Eligibility Criteria Form v 1.0
steps: HuBMAP Donor and Tissue Eligibility Criteria Form Version 1.0 Effective Date: 1/1/2019 Ineligible Eligible Overall eligibility Does the consent allow for research activities? ☐ No ☐ Yes Can the tissue collection be completed within 4 hours of clamp time? ☐ No ☐ Yes Is the HIV/HCV/HBV NAT non-reactive? ☐ No ☐ Yes Is the HBV Surface Antigen test non-reactive? ☐ No ☐ Yes Is the HCV Encoded Antigen test non-reactive? ☐ No ☐ Yes For collection of bowel samples Is there a prior history of gastrointestinal disease? ☐ Yes ☐ No Does the CT scan show any evidence of bowel abnormality? ☐ Yes ☐ No For collection of heart samples Is the EKG normal? ☐ No ☐ Yes If done, does the echocardiogram show EF >= 50%? ☐ No ☐ Yes / not done For collection of lung samples Does the CT scan note lung pathology such as bullae or pneumonia? ☐ Yes ☐ No For collection of pancreas samples Does the CT scan note the presence of lesions, tumors, ☐ Yes ☐ No or calcifications? For collection of aorta samples Does the CT scan note the presence of atherosclerotic disease ☐ Yes ☐ No or aneurysm?
creator: Yiing Lin
